dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3408 IS: Change Corruption Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Merkley (for himself, Ms. Cortez Masto, Mr. Wyden, Mr. Blumenthal, and Mr. Kim) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To prohibit a United States currency featuring the likeness of a living or sitting President.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Change Corruption Act.

section.header: No United States currency featuring the likeness of a living or sitting President
section.text: No United States currency may feature the likeness of a living or sitting President.
